channel.title: BSides Kraków Blog
channel.description: Practical guides, community stories and event updates from BSides Kraków.

item.title: BSides Kraków 2026: the essential event guide
item.description: Date, venue, tickets, talks, villages and practical details for planning your conference day.

item.title: Your first BSides conference: a practical guide
item.description: How to choose sessions, meet people and enjoy your first community cybersecurity conference.

item.title: Why community cybersecurity events matter
item.description: How accessible learning, shared practice and local relationships strengthen cybersecurity.

item.title: Meet all 28 speakers at BSides Kraków 2026
item.description: Meet the researchers, builders and practitioners speaking at BSides Kraków 2026.

item.title: Women Go Tech Village: visibility, careers and connection
item.description: Explore a village focused on professional growth, shared experience and an inclusive tech community.

item.title: Cyber Games Village: learn security by playing it
item.description: Discover collaborative security games built around practice, decision-making and shared learning.

item.title: AppSec & Red Team Village: where builders meet breakers
item.description: Explore the practical feedback loop between secure software engineering and offensive testing.

item.title: Business Village: turning security into better decisions
item.description: Connect technical risk with governance, resilience, priorities and security strategy.

item.title: Meet the sponsors and partners behind BSides Kraków 2026
item.description: Meet every organisation helping make BSides Kraków 2026 possible, presented by partnership level.
